tool.name: generate_fix_patch
tool.description:
Ask the LLM to produce a unified-diff patch that remediates a finding.
Either pass finding_id (pulls details from engagement state) or pass title + vuln_type + file_path + vulnerable_snippet directly. Returns patch_diff suitable for create_autofix_pr.
LLM instructed to produce minimal, reviewable patches — not full refactors. Falls back to heuristic template when LLM unavailable.

parameter.name: remediation_hint
parameter.description: Optional freeform hint to steer the LLM.
